---
title: "Niederer Slab Release Example"
format: html
---

## Single Live Figure

This shipped example uses a compact surface export of the Niederer et al. slab
benchmark. It is small enough to keep in git while still exercising the live
field switcher and timestep playback used by 4Dpapers figures.

{{< 4d-image
    id="niederer-slab"
    src="data/niederer/niederer.vtk.series"
    field="Vm"
    fields="Vm,activationTime,ionicCurrent,Jsi,externalStimulusCurrent"
    time="last"
    caption="Niederer slab surface at the final timestep. Use the field menu to switch scalar arrays and press play to animate the 8-step sequence."
>}}

## Synced Comparison Panel

The same series can also drive a synced panel. This is the lightest way to
show a before-and-after view while keeping one shared camera state.

{{< 4d-panel
    id="niederer-panel"
    layout="2x1"
    height="420px"
    camera="sync"
    caption="First and last Niederer timesteps shown side by side with a shared camera."
    src1="data/niederer/niederer.vtk.series"
    id1="niederer-first"
    field1="Vm"
    time1="0"
    fields1="Vm,activationTime,ionicCurrent,Jsi,externalStimulusCurrent"
    src2="data/niederer/niederer.vtk.series"
    id2="niederer-last"
    field2="Vm"
    time2="last"
    fields2="Vm,activationTime,ionicCurrent,Jsi,externalStimulusCurrent"
>}}

## Timeseries Strip

For publication layouts that need several representative timesteps at once,
`4d-timeseries` expands the same source into a synchronized progression view.

{{< 4d-timeseries
    id="niederer-timeseries"
    src="data/niederer/niederer.vtk.series"
    field="Vm"
    times="0,2,4,last"
    height="320px"
    caption="Representative Vm snapshots across the 8-step Niederer sequence."
>}}

## Plotly Graph

The example workspace also includes a small Plotly JSON figure so the release
demo covers both 4D geometry and graph embedding.

{{< 4d-graph
    id="niederer-graph"
    src="data/plots/niederer_signal.json"
    caption="Synthetic activation-style signal used to smoke-test Plotly JSON embedding."
>}}
